name: dapu
tagline: Precision Timing and RF Solutions for Modern Electronics
description: Dapu Microelectronics is a leading Chinese fabless semiconductor company specializing in high-performance clock chips, RF devices, and sensors. With advanced design capabilities and comprehensive product portfolios, Dapu serves communications, automotive, industrial, and consumer markets.
longDescription: Dapu Microelectronics Co., Ltd., founded in 2005 and headquartered in Shenzhen, China, is a premier fabless semiconductor company specializing in precision timing devices, radio frequency (RF) components, and sensor solutions. The company has established itself as a key supplier in China's domestic semiconductor industry, offering competitive alternatives to international brands like SiTime, Skyworks, and Texas Instruments. Dapu's product portfolio includes high-performance crystal oscillators (XO), voltage-controlled oscillators (VCXO), temperature-compensated oscillators (TCXO), oven-controlled oscillators (OCXO), RF filters, LNAs, and various sensors. With comprehensive quality certifications including ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and AEC-Q100 for automotive products, Dapu serves a wide range of applications from 5G base stations and automotive electronics to industrial automation and IoT devices. The company's commitment to innovation is demonstrated by its continuous investment in advanced timing technologies and RF solutions. As an authorized Dapu distributor, we provide comprehensive technical support, application engineering services, and reliable supply chain management for customers worldwide. Contact us for the Dapu product selection guide and distributor pricing.

coreProducts.name: Crystal Oscillators (XO)
coreProducts.description: High-precision crystal oscillators offering low jitter, wide frequency range, and various package options for general-purpose timing applications.

coreProducts.name: Temperature Compensated Oscillators (TCXO)
coreProducts.description: High-stability TCXOs with excellent frequency stability over temperature for GPS, cellular, and wireless communication applications.

coreProducts.name: Voltage Controlled Oscillators (VCXO)
coreProducts.description: Precision VCXOs with wide pull range and low phase noise for PLL applications and frequency synthesis.

coreProducts.name: RF Filters and LNAs
coreProducts.description: High-performance RF filters and low-noise amplifiers for 5G, WiFi, Bluetooth, and cellular communication systems.

industries.name: Telecommunications
industries.description: Precision timing and RF solutions for 5G base stations, small cells, optical networks, and wireless infrastructure.

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: AEC-Q100 qualified timing devices and sensors for ADAS, infotainment, body electronics, and powertrain systems.

industries.name: Industrial Automation
industries.description: Reliable timing and sensing solutions for industrial control, motor drives, robotics, and factory automation.

industries.name: Consumer Electronics
industries.description: Cost-effective timing and RF solutions for smartphones, tablets, wearables, and smart home devices.

certifications.name: ISO 9001
certifications.description: Quality management system certification ensuring consistent product quality and reliability

certifications.name: ISO 14001
certifications.description: Environmental management system certification for sustainable manufacturing practices

certifications.name: AEC-Q100
certifications.description: Automotive Electronics Council qualification for integrated circuits used in automotive applications

certifications.name: IATF 16949
certifications.description: Automotive quality management system certification for automotive component supply

seoTitle: Dapu Microelectronics Distributor | Timing, RF, Sensors | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized Dapu Microelectronics distributor. Supplying crystal oscillators, TCXO, VCXO, RF filters, and sensors for telecom, automotive, and industrial applications. Get selection guide and quote.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Dapu Microelectronics?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of Dapu Microelectronics products. We maintain direct relationships with Dapu and provide genuine products with full manufacturer warranty and technical support. Our authorization covers the complete Dapu product portfolio including crystal oscillators, TCXOs, VCXOs, RF filters, LNAs, and sensors. Customers can verify our distributor status through Dapu's official website or by contacting Dapu directly. As an authorized distributor, we offer competitive pricing, stable supply chain management, and comprehensive technical support services including application engineering and design assistance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify distributor credentials and discuss your project requirements. We can provide official authorization letters and support documentation.

faqs.question: What are Dapu's core competitive advantages in timing devices?
faqs.answer: Dapu Microelectronics has established strong competitive advantages in the timing device market. First, Dapu offers cost-effective solutions without compromising quality, making precision timing accessible for cost-sensitive applications. Second, the company provides rapid customization services for specific frequency and performance requirements. Third, Dapu maintains local manufacturing partnerships ensuring stable supply and shorter lead times compared to international competitors. Fourth, their products offer competitive jitter performance and frequency stability specifications. Fifth, Dapu provides excellent technical support with fast response times for customer inquiries. Finally, their automotive-qualified products (AEC-Q100) meet stringent reliability requirements for automotive applications. These advantages make Dapu particularly attractive for domestic Chinese manufacturers and cost-sensitive global customers.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring precision timing with cost constraints, Dapu products offer excellent value. Request a technical consultation to evaluate Dapu solutions for your specific application.

faqs.question: How do Dapu timing products compare with SiTime and Epson?
faqs.answer: Dapu timing products offer competitive performance compared to established brands like SiTime and Epson while providing significant cost advantages. In crystal oscillators, Dapu's standard XO products achieve comparable phase noise and jitter performance to Epson equivalents at 20-30% lower cost. For TCXOs, Dapu offers stability specifications ranging from ±0.5ppm to ±2.0ppm, competitive with SiTime and Epson offerings. VCXO products provide similar pull range and linearity characteristics. The main differences are that Dapu focuses primarily on mainstream applications rather than specialized high-end markets, and their MEMS-based products are still developing compared to SiTime's mature MEMS portfolio. For most telecommunications, industrial, and consumer applications, Dapu provides viable alternatives that can reduce BOM costs while maintaining quality and reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider Dapu for cost-sensitive applications or where local technical support is important. Contact our FAE team for detailed comparison data and application-specific recommendations.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of purchasing Dapu products through LiTong?
faqs.answer: Purchasing Dapu products through LiTong Electronics provides multiple benefits. As an authorized distributor, we guarantee genuine products with full traceability and manufacturer warranty. We maintain strategic inventory of popular Dapu products for quick delivery. Our technical team includes FAEs with deep expertise in timing and RF applications who can provide design recommendations and troubleshooting support. We offer flexible payment terms and competitive pricing based on volume commitments. Additionally, we provide value-added services including BOM analysis, alternative part recommendations, frequency customization coordination, and supply chain optimization. For automotive customers, we can support PPAP documentation and traceability requirements. Our local presence ensures fast response times for technical and logistics support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Partner with LiTong for reliable Dapu supply, technical support, and value-added services. Submit your BOM for analysis and competitive quotation.

faqs.question: Does Dapu provide automotive-qualified timing products?
faqs.answer: Yes, Dapu provides comprehensive automotive-qualified timing products meeting AEC-Q100 standards. Their automotive portfolio includes crystal oscillators, TCXOs, and clock generators specifically designed for automotive applications. These products undergo rigorous qualification testing including high temperature operating life (HTOL), temperature cycling, and mechanical stress tests. Key features include extended temperature range (-40°C to +125°C), enhanced reliability, and PPAP documentation support. Applications include ADAS systems, infotainment, body electronics, and powertrain control. Dapu's automotive products are already deployed in various domestic Chinese automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers. The company provides long-term supply commitments and change control processes required for automotive production.
faqs.decisionGuide: For automotive applications, specify Dapu AEC-Q100 qualified products. Contact us for PPAP documentation and qualification support.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for Dapu timing products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for Dapu timing products through our experienced FAE team. Our support services include product selection guidance based on jitter, stability, and power requirements, frequency customization coordination with Dapu factory, schematic and layout review for timing circuits, phase noise and jitter measurement support, and failure analysis assistance. We can facilitate direct technical communication with Dapu's application engineering team for complex requirements. For high-volume customers, we offer design review services and can arrange factory visits. We also provide application notes, design guides, and reference designs. Our goal is to ensure customers achieve optimal performance and reliability with Dapu timing products in their designs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Leverage our technical expertise for your Dapu-based designs. Schedule a design review or technical consultation with our FAE team.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Dapu timing products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for Dapu timing products vary based on product type and order volume. Standard catalog products typically have 6-10 week lead times for production orders. Custom frequency parts may require 8-12 weeks depending on frequency and quantity. High-volume automotive programs can establish VMI (Vendor Managed Inventory) arrangements or frame orders with scheduled deliveries. LiTong maintains safety stock of popular Dapu products for immediate availability on select items. For urgent requirements, we can work with Dapu to expedite production or identify suitable alternatives from our inventory. We recommend customers provide rolling forecasts for better supply planning, especially for custom frequency parts that require factory programming.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for current lead times and inventory availability. Consider establishing frame orders for stable supply of high-volume products.
